payload.answer: I could not safely remember the article content because the fetch returned a 404/network error. I only retained the retrieval failure as tentative metadata.
payload.decision: Do not commit the article's content as durable memory because the fetch failed with a 404/network error; only record the retrieval failure tentatively.

payload.intent: Remember the referenced article for potential future use in memory architecture.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt to fetch https://example.com/missing for a memory-architecture-related article failed with a 404/network error, so the article content is unavailable from this source.
